intro: A hidden magical system, a surprising ally, and a city on the edge.
description:
Tomas discovers that beneath a modern city there is an invisible magical network that keeps the balance between humans and magical creatures. When that balance begins to fail, he teams up with Lumi, a misunderstood magical creature, to investigate strange anomalies that no one else seems to notice. As the mystery unfolds, Tomas learns that harmony between both worlds cannot be achieved through control, it has to be built through cooperation, trust, and coexistence.

An interactive storybook experience. A linear narrative adventure, perfect for young readers to enjoy a captivating story at their own pace.
